Tweet by @RajaPatnaik (Raja Patnaik)
Author bio: Head of AI (Research) @ Asset Manager. Quant PhD. Financial economist. Engineer. Tech and science enthusiast. Angel investor. All opinions are my own.
Text: Very cool stuff out of @NousResearch. They open-sourced a system that lets Hermes agents evolve themselves — no GPU training required.

It uses GEPA to automatically improve skills, prompts, and tool descriptions. Here's how it works: https://t.co/t217M2r8Zn
